summary:
Added a temporary test marker to the bottom of the holding page footer reading "Command Center live test — safe to remove".
Styled small (11px) and muted, on its own line below the existing footer row.
Both the CSS rule and the markup are labelled TEMPORARY in comments so they are easy to find and delete.
Change is 4 additive lines in one file; nothing else was touched.
Branch pushed and PR opened; stopped at "PR ready" per the charter.
notes: Could not visually confirm the render: no browser is available in the worker environment, so no screenshot was taken. Verified instead that the marker text matches the requested string byte-for-byte (em dash included), that the HTML parses with no unclosed or mismatched tags, and that the diff is 4 additive lines in one file. Render risk is low for additive CSS/markup on a static page, but a human should eyeball the page before merging. This result file is named results/cc-f9337d04.json exactly as the task specified, which omits the separate <run-id> segment used by the results/README.md naming pattern (results/<task-id>.<run-id>.json); the task's explicit filename was followed. Commit sha 1a1b56b216f3e92cf31a83815bdb73a168ebe2e6. Not merged, not deployed; nothing outside this repository touched.
